ns0:entry.ns0:title: PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PojavLauncherTeam/PojavLauncher_iOS
Language: objective-c
A Minecraft: Java Edition Launcher for Android and iOS based on Boardwalk. Succeeded by https://github.com/AngelAuraMC/Amethyst-iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ReactiveCocoa/ReactiveObjC
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ReactiveCocoa/ReactiveObjC
Language: objective-c
The 2.x ReactiveCocoa Objective-C API: Streams of values over time

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SoCuul/SCInsta
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SoCuul/SCInsta
Language: objective-c
A feature-rich tweak for Instagram on iOS!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Tencent/lemon-cleaner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Tencent/lemon-cleaner
Language: objective-c
腾讯柠檬清理是针对macOS系统专属制定的清理工具。主要功能包括重复文件和相似照片的识别、软件的定制化垃圾扫描、可视化的全盘空间分析、内存释放、浏览器隐私清理以及设备实时状态的监控等。重点聚焦清理功能，对上百款软件提供定制化的清理方案，提供专业的清理建议，帮助用户轻松完成一键式清理。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TencentCloud/TIMSDK
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TencentCloud/TIMSDK
Language: objective-c
Chat SDK (IM SDK) — Build in-app messaging with chat API, UIKit & send message capabilities. Supports Android, iOS, Flutter, Web, React Native, uni-app, HarmonyOS & more. Features: one-to-one chat, group chat, message push, real-time messaging, offline push, chat UI components.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: geode-sdk/ios-launcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/geode-sdk/ios-launcher
Language: objective-c
Manages installing and launching Geometry Dash for iOS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gnachman/iTerm2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gnachman/iTerm2
Language: objective-c
iTerm2 is a terminal emulator for Mac OS X that does amazing things.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: joeldev/JLRoutes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/joeldev/JLRoutes
Language: objective-c
URL routing library for iOS with a simple block-based API

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/material-foundation/material-internationalization-ios
Language: objective-c
MDFInternationalization assists in internationalizing your IOS app or components.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mixpanel/mixpanel-iphone
Language: objective-c
Official iOS (Objective-C) Tracking Library for Mixpanel Analytics
